items.name: 銅造 阿弥陀如来立像

en.name_en: Standing Bronze Statue of Amida Nyorai
en.description_en: This standing bronze statue of Amida Nyorai (Amitabha Buddha) is a sculpture in the Tangible Cultural Property category. It is municipally designated by Koga City.

en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Shianbashi Site
en.description_en: These artifacts excavated from the Shianbashi site are archaeological material in the Tangible Cultural Property category. They are municipally designated by Koga City.

en.description_en: This color-on-silk painting of the Ryokai (Two-World) Mandala is a painting in the Tangible Cultural Property category. It is municipally designated by Koga City.

en.description_en: This gold-lettered stone stupa tablet bearing a Choroku 5 inscription, excavated from the Hondayama site, is historical material in the Tangible Cultural Property category. It is municipally designated by Koga City.

en.description_en: The Sakama monument, a merit stele of the Matsudaira Fujii family, is a Historic Site in the Monuments category of Japanese cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Koga City.

en.description_en: This structure, the former northwest gate of Koga Castle now serving as the main gate of Fukuhoji Temple, is a building in the Tangible Cultural Property category. It is municipally designated by Koga City.
